error_signature: concatenate expects to have a list of arguments, not an array
title: Concatenate function not handling array correctly
symptom: Using the concatenate function with an array results in unwanted comma delimiters between string values.
not_this_if: Using the concatenate function with individual string arguments
root_cause: The concatenate function is designed to accept individual string arguments rather than an array. When an array is passed directly, it treats the entire array as a single argument, leading to unexpected formatting.
fix_steps: Modify the function call to spread the array: concatenate(...map(original_collection,string_field_key))
Alternatively, use the join method: join(map(original_collection,string_field_key), ' ') for space-separated strings.
agent_instruction: Use the spread operator with the concatenate function or switch to the join method for better control over delimiters.
